fields.label: Public API Key
fields.description: Sage Sales Management public API key used as the /login username. Admins can find API keys in Settings > Integrations > API key management in the web app or ForceAdmin.

fields.label: Private API Key
fields.description: Sage Sales Management private API key used as the /login password. Admins can view or generate it in ForceAdmin API keys.

actions.name: create_account
actions.description: Create one Sage Sales Management account.

raw.description: The raw Sage Sales Management response payload.

outputSchema.description: The Sage Sales Management account response.

actions.name: list_accounts
actions.description: List Sage Sales Management accounts with optional filters and pagination.

page.description: The zero-based page number to request.

count.description: The number of records to return in the page.

where.description: The official Sage Sales Management SQL-like where filter.

order.description: The official Sage Sales Management order expression.

lang.description: The response language code requested from Sage Sales Management.

extraFieldDescription.description: Whether Sage Sales Management should include extra field descriptions in each record.

inputSchema.description: Filters, ordering, and pagination for listing Sage Sales Management resources.

items.description: One Sage Sales Management account record.

accounts.description: The Sage Sales Management account records returned by the API.

raw.description: The raw Sage Sales Management response payload.

outputSchema.description: The Sage Sales Management account list response.
